initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT postHistory.UserId
FROM postHistory
JOIN posts ON postHistory.PostId = posts.Id
JOIN users ON postHistory.UserId = users.Id
WHERE users.Views >= 1000
  AND posts.ViewCount >= 1000
GROUP BY postHistory.UserId, postHistory.PostId
HAVING COUNT(postHistory.PostId) = 1;

SELECT postHistory.UserId
FROM postHistory
JOIN posts ON postHistory.PostId = posts.Id
JOIN users ON postHistory.UserId = users.Id
WHERE users.Views >= 1000
  AND posts.ViewCount >= 1000
GROUP BY postHistory.UserId, postHistory.PostId
HAVING COUNT(postHistory.PostId) = 1;

SELECT postHistory.UserId

JOIN users ON postHistory.UserId = users.Id
WHERE users.Views >= 1000
  AND posts.ViewCount >= 1000
GROUP BY postHistory.UserId, postHistory.PostId

SELECT ph.UserId
FROM postHistory ph
JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
JOIN users u ON ph.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.Views >= 1000
  AND p.ViewCount >= 1000
GROUP BY ph.UserId, ph.PostId
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1;

SELECT ph.UserId
FROM postHistory ph
JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
JOIN users u ON ph.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.Views >= 1000
  AND p.ViewCount >= 1000
GROUP BY ph.UserId, ph.PostId
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1;
